summary: Frontend-only validation of the laundry/pressing CYAN-accent enrichment across customer (/services/laundry/results, /services/laundry/booking/{id}) and management (/management/laundry → Management tab) screens. Used realistic User-Agent + CF-challenge retry loop per the agent-to-agent note (one initial CF block on the management run cleared after a 60s cool-down). All 4 seeded shops render correctly with the expected enrichment. Customer results: cyan header + '4 shops found', 4 grid cards with type-badges (Pressing/Laundry/Pressing/Laundry + Pressing), Express/Delivery flag badges, cyan price color, shop-type-filter dropdown + view-mode-grid/list toggles all present. List view for Royal Pressing Yaoundé shows phone (+237 698 88 77 66), '48h turnaround', service chips, 4 per-item-price chips (Shirt · 500 FCFA / T-shirt · 350 FCFA / Trousers / Pants · 750 FCFA / Suit (2-piece) · 2,500 FCFA) + '+3 more', MoMo/Card payment labels, 'FROM 350 FCFA per item · 7 items priced'. Click Book Now navigates to /services/laundry/booking/a5772757-... Booking page: booking-shop-thumb (cyan-ringed) present, violet 'Pressing' badge, 'Yaoundé', '48h turnaround', Service Type label correctly HIDDEN for pressing-only shop, 7 item-inc/dec buttons with the EXACT real item_prices (Shirt 500, T-shirt 350, Trousers/Pants 750, Suit 2-piece 2500, Suit 3-piece 3500, Dress 1500, Boubou (traditional) 2000). Management: 'Add Shop' button has bg-gradient cyan-600→cyan-700 classes, 4 pressing-card-{id} cards rendered, cover photos+thumbnail strip+shop-type-badge overlay, address/phone/turnaround, service chips, violet per-item preview chips (e.g. Shirt · 400 FCFA, Suit (2-piece) · 2,000 FCFA), Delivery/Express badges + payment icons, cyan-colored pricing ('1,200 FCFA/kg · 4 items', 'from 350 FCFA / item', '1,500 FCFA / kg'), and view-mode-list/grid/details toggle. Add-Shop modal opens with STOREFRONT PHOTOS section, 3 shop-type tiles, LIVE PREVIEW card; selecting Pressing reveals 16 preset chips (Shirt, T-shirt, Trousers/Pants, Jeans, Suit 2-piece, Suit 3-piece, Jacket/Blazer, Dress, Skirt, Boubou (traditional), Kaftan, Bedsheet, Duvet, Curtain (per panel), Tablecloth, Towel) and the per-item editor with custom add row. Zero 403 console errors after CF cleared. All four feature areas pass end-to-end.

design_issues.screen: /services/laundry/results — grid view (3rd card Royal Pressing Yaoundé)
issues: Cosmetic: while the Unsplash hero image is still loading, the shop name text appears overlaid on the image area as raw alt text bleed (visible at the top-left of the gradient stub). Once the image loads it disappears, but on slow connections / Playwright cold-load it briefly looks like a layering bug. Consider rendering a solid cyan-gradient placeholder (like the management cards' Shirt-icon fallback) under instead of letting alt text render, or set img with onerror handler hiding the alt.

action_items: (Cosmetic only) Hide alt text on customer results-grid hero images while loading to avoid the brief layering of the shop name on top of the gradient placeholder (see design_issues).
critical_code_review_comments: /app/frontend/src/pages/services/LaundryResults.jsx (534 lines) — clean factor of GridCard / ListCard / Filters. SHOP_TYPE_BADGE map at top yields cyan for laundry / violet for pressing / cyan→violet gradient for both. AlmostSoldOutBadge wired into a `laundry-fomo-grid-{id}` wrapper (silently returns null until backend exposes a count field, per iter179 note). pricing helper at line 41-62 correctly chooses headline + unitLabel per shop_type. data-testid coverage: laundry-results-header, shop-type-filter, view-mode-grid/list, laundry-card-grid-{id}, laundry-card-list-{id}, shop-type-{id}, express-{id}, delivery-{id}, price-{id}, list-price-{id}, book-btn-{id}, book-list-btn-{id} — full spec coverage.

/app/frontend/src/pages/services/LaundryBooking.jsx — Service Type selector wrapped in a conditional that skips render when shop.shop_type === 'pressing' (confirmed at runtime: 'Service Type' text not present for Royal Pressing Yaoundé). booking-shop-thumb rendered when service.images?.[0] exists, with ring-2 ring-cyan-200. item-inc-/item-dec-/item-count- testids correctly slugify the item label (saw item-0-shirt, item-2-trousers-pants, item-3-suit-2-piece-, item-6-boubou-traditional-).

/app/frontend/src/pages/management/LaundryManagement.jsx (814 lines) — at line 539 the legacy Replace button still uses text-[#082c59] hover:bg-[#082c59]/10 (Oryno-blue, not cyan). The rest of the file has migrated to cyan-600/700. Recommend swapping to text-cyan-700 hover:bg-cyan-50 for consistency with the rest of the management card actions. NOT a blocker — only one button.

/app/frontend/src/pages/management/LaundryManagement.jsx — file is 814 lines; consider splitting the card markup (lines ~430-540) and the view-shop dialog body (lines ~674+) into separate components for maintainability. Current single-file size is at the 700-line guideline ceiling.

/app/frontend/src/components/management/laundry/PressingFormBody.jsx (444 lines) — the 16-chip preset list in the Pressing branch matches the spec exactly. Live preview card on the right correctly switches label/price between per-kg, per-item, and 'both'. Inputs all have keyboard-accessible labels. Good.

success_rate.backend: skipped (per request — verified by prev iter test_pressing_enriched_modal.py 7/7)
success_rate.frontend: 100% — all 4 review-request feature areas pass (results header + 4 cards + filters + viewmodes + list-view per-item chips, booking page pressing-only branch + 7-item editor with real prices, management Add-Shop cyan button + 4 cards + viewmode toggle, Add-Shop modal opens with shop-type tiles + 16 preset chips on Pressing select)

seed_data_creation: None added — relied on the 4 main-agent-seeded shops (Sparkle Express Laundry, Royal Pressing Yaoundé, Wash & Press 360, Royal Fresh). Their IDs are visible in screenshots/output: 8158d1e9-...(Sparkle), a5772757-...(Royal Pressing Yaoundé), 47d99694-...(Wash & Press 360), 74e62cd9-...(Royal Fresh).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cloudflare burst-block remains the dominant Playwright friction on this preview. The realistic UA + 'wait_until=domcontentloaded' (not networkidle) + retry-with-30-to-45s-sleep-on-CF-challenge pattern bypassed it on both customer and management runs. The customer flow works in a single browser session; running a NEW context for the admin login within ~1 min of the customer run triggered the CF interstitial — waited 60s and the second run cleared. If retesting in <60s of a prior burst, expect CF to gate.
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional bug found. Only one cosmetic finding (alt-text bleed on slow-loading hero) and one consistency nit (one Replace button still on Oryno-blue #082c59 hex in LaundryManagement.jsx:539). Both are non-blocking; main agent can mop up at leisure.
